title: urandra umbellata
intro: Urandra umbellata, also known as Fern-leaved Bitter Apple, is a plant species native to Australia and Asia, characterized by its bitter apple-like fruits and fern-like leaves. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Urandra umbellata include treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as providing antioxidant and immunomodulatory effects. Urandra umbellata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being used in traditional remedies, although its efficacy and safety may vary depending on the preparation and dosage.
